name: [WIP] Terrain Shadow Removal
author: automata-rtx
description: Removes the fake shadow that Twilight Princess scrolls across the terrain as an animated texture overlay (e.g. the slowly drifting dappled shade on forest floors), so realtime shadow/GI mods provide the shading instead. Works by skipping the draw of the room terrain's texture-animated materials - waterfalls and water are separate actors and are never affected. EXPERIMENTAL and off by default: if a room's shadow shares the base ground material, enabling this can leave the ground looking wrong there, so test per area.
